action.reasoning: Observation: I've explored the data structure and found that we have training and validation sets with images and corresponding labels. The vocabulary contains 134 tokens including special tokens like <pad>, <sos>, <eos>, <unk>. The images are grayscale PNGs with variable sizes up to 320x1600. The labels are space-separated LaTeX tokens. Now I need to create the basic files for training: model.py, dataset.py, train.py, and predict.py. I'll start with a simple architecture using a CNN encoder and LSTM decoder, similar to image captioning approaches.
action.command: ls -la && head -n 10 model.py && head -n 10 dataset.py && head -n 10 train.py && head -n 10 predict.py
